title: sida neglecta
intro: Sida neglecta, also known as the little mallow or Sida plant, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sida neglecta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Sida neglecta can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
